name: teoprayoga/teobiefy-laravel-api-response
description: Laravel API response helpers with server-configured payload compression and encryption.

suggest.ext-sodium: Required for native xchacha20-poly1305 and chacha20-poly1305-ietf payload encryption.
suggest.paragonie/sodium_compat: Optional fallback for sodium payload encryption when api.encryption.allow_sodium_compat_fallback is enabled.
